snippet: An education support class employee who holds an appropriate first aid qualification, is required to be available to provide first aid and who agrees to perform first aid in addition to their normal duties will be paid a first aid allowance. A first aid allowance is payable where first aid duties comprise less than 60% of an employee's normal duties. The first aid allowance for a full-time education support class employee (pro rata for part-time employee) is as follows: The payment of the first aid allowance to an education support class employee should continue during a period of paid leave, provided that the duties and responsibilities associated with the allowance would have continued had the leave not been approved. For information regarding first aid in schools, refer to First Aid for Students and Staff under Related topics in Overview .
